Caption: Coefficient of friction (COF) versus distance of CoCr, ErGOCoCr and HA-ErGOCoCr disk surfaces against AISI316 steel balls under a normal load of 1 N and sliding of 120 rpm in PBS (a) and PBS-HA (b).
Average COF of CoCr, ErGOCoCr and HA-ErGOCoCr surfaces against AISI316 ball in PBS and PBS-HA.

Secondary electron images of the wear tracks after wear corrosion of CoCr, ErGOCoCr and HA-ErGOCoCr surfaces after 500 m against AISI316 steel balls under a normal load of 1 N and sliding of 120 rpm in PBS.

a) Secondary electron general view of the different zones of the surface a): outside, interface and wear track and b) detail of stuck deposits (zone 4 in a) in the ErGOCoCr disk after 500 m against AISI316 ball under a normal load of 1 N and sliding of 120 rpm in PBS.
Optical microscope images of the AISI316 ball scar after wear corrosion against CoCr (a) and HA-ErGOCoCr (b) surfaces in PBS-HA.
